MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Dick Chang is present
Attorney Daniel Bornstein appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Phillip Durrill present.
Attorney Matthew D. Show representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of May-14-2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
